GithubMarketplace.Description: Install Matomo plugins directly from GitHub zip URLs.
GithubMarketplace.ZipUrlHelp: Paste the URL to a GitHub release zip file (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo/archive/refs/tags/v1.0.0.zip)
GithubMarketplace.NoPlugins: No plugins installed from GitHub yet.
GithubMarketplace.ConfirmRemove: Remove this plugin from tracking? (This does not uninstall the plugin)
GithubMarketplace.RemoveNote: Note: Removing from tracking does not uninstall the plugin. Use the Plugins page to uninstall.
